prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年西南财经大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约5971名、6248名、6691名、7172名、8325名，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约2354名，年均 后移约470名；2025年基准位次约8325名，较2024年后移约1153名，降幅明显；该校在北京市综合类招生计划逐年缩减：2021年54人、2022年51人、2023年49人 、2024年47人、2025年43人；2026年计划进一步缩减至40人（较2025年减少3人），连续6年缩招，供给减少对竞争形成加剧效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南财经大学为211工程、双 一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第65–76名区间（2026年约第66名），属于全国中上游水平，在财经类院校中位居前列；2026年高考周期声誉评价 为中性/混合，未见明显负面舆情或投档异常信号；抖音学校热度排名第92位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现显著热度波动；第五轮学 科评估中，应用经济学获评A+（全国顶尖）、工商管理获评A、统计学获评A-；上述学科与该校金融学类、会计学、工商管理类、统计学类等招生专业高度对应，学科实力对相关 专业报考有稳定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业2024年社会热度评价为分化观望，较前两年有所降温，但应用经济学A+的学科地位仍具吸引力；北京市2026 年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约19466人（增幅约29.7%），考生规模大幅增长，竞争环境显著加剧；西南财经大学位于四川省成都市，在北京属于跨省招生；该校在北京招生计划从2021年54人持续缩减至2026年40人，本地招生占比逐年下降，跨省报考竞争 压力相应增大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划进一步缩减（40人）、北京市考生总数大幅增长（约29.7%）以及专业热度分化等因素，预计2026 年竞争较2025年进一步加剧。预测2026年综合类最低录取位次约8177名，波动区间7677–8677名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约8177名，波动区间7677–8677名。位次在区间中上段（约7700–8000名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（金融学创新实验班、智能金融联合学位等）；位次在区间中段（约8 000–8300名）以二档为主力选择（会计学、金融学类、工商管理类等），兼顾学科评估A+优势；位次在区间下段（约8300–8700名）建议以三档保底（统计学类、计算机类、精算 学等），确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Southwestern University of Finance and Economics in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 5971, 6248, 6691, 7172, and 8325, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2354 places over the past 5 years, averaging about 470 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 8325, a backward shift of about 1153 places compared to 2024, a significant decline; the university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Beijing has been decreasing year by year: 54 in 2021, 51 in 2022, 49 in 2023, 47 in 2024, and 43 in 2025; the 2026 plan further reduces to 40 (3 fewer than 2025), with 6 consecutive years of enrollment reduction, and the reduced supply intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been stable in the 65th–76th range in recent years (approximately 66th in 2026), placing it at the upper-middle level nationally and among the top in financial and economic institutions; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission signals; the university's Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd, rated as average, with short video exposure at a medium-low level and no significant heat fluctuations; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A+ (top in the country), Business Administration rated A, and Statistics rated A-; these disciplines closely correspond to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, and Statistics, providing stable support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity evaluation for finance/financial/economics majors is divided and cautious, with some cooling compared to the previous two years, but the A+ discipline status of Applied Economics still attracts interest; the total number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is about 84,900, an increase of about 19,466 (approximately 29.7%) from 65,434 in 2025, leading to a significant increase in competition; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, and recruits across provinces in Beijing; its enrollment plan in Beijing has continuously decreased from 54 in 2021 to 40 in 2026, with the local enrollment share declining year by year, increasing the competitive pressure for cross-provincial applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the further reduction of the 2026 enrollment plan (40), the significant increase in the total number of Beijing examinees (approximately 29.7%), and the divergence in major popularity, competition in 2026 is expected to intensify compared to 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking for the comprehensive category in 2026 is approximately 8177, with a fluctuation range of 7677–8677.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 8177, with a fluctuation range of 7677–8677. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (about 7700–8000) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Finance Innovation Experimental Class, Smart Finance Joint Degree, etc.); those with rankings in the middle part (about 8000–8300) should primarily choose Tier 2 majors (Accounting, Finance Majors, Business Administration Majors, etc.), while also considering the A+ discipline advantage; candidates with rankings in the lower part (about 8300–8700) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net (Statistics Majors, Computer Majors, Actuarial Science, etc.) to ensure admission.
